registry.name: filesystem
registry.description: Read, write, search, and manage local files and directories

setup.instructions: Specify which directories the server is allowed to access.

fields.label: Allowed Directories
fields.description: Comma-separated list of directories the server can read/write

registry.name: fetch
registry.description: Fetch any URL — web pages, APIs, JSON data

registry.name: memory
registry.description: Persistent memory across sessions — remembers facts and preferences

registry.name: puppeteer
registry.description: Browser automation — screenshots, web scraping, form filling

registry.name: brave-search
registry.description: Search the web using Brave Search API

setup.instructions: Sign up for a free Brave Search API key to enable web search.

fields.label: Brave Search API Key
fields.description: API key from Brave Search developer portal

registry.name: google-maps
registry.description: Places, directions, geocoding, distance — great for travel planning

setup.instructions: Create a Google Cloud project and enable the Maps API to get a key.

fields.label: Google Maps API Key
fields.description: API key with Maps JavaScript, Places, and Directions APIs enabled

registry.name: github
registry.description: GitHub repos, issues, PRs, code search, and file access

setup.instructions: Create a GitHub personal access token with the scopes you need (repo, read:org, etc.).

fields.label: GitHub Personal Access Token
fields.description: Fine-grained or classic token with repo access

registry.name: sqlite
registry.description: Query and manage SQLite databases — great for tracking data

setup.instructions: Provide the path to your SQLite database file. A new file will be created if it doesn't exist.

fields.label: Database Path
fields.description: Absolute path to the SQLite database file

registry.name: slack
registry.description: Read and send Slack messages, search channels

setup.instructions: Create a Slack app and install it to your workspace to get a bot token.

fields.label: Slack Bot Token
fields.description: Bot user OAuth token from your Slack app (starts with xoxb-)

registry.name: google-calendar
registry.description: View, create, and manage Google Calendar events

setup.instructions: Requires Google OAuth setup. Create a Google Cloud project, enable the Calendar API, create OAuth 2.0 credentials (Desktop app type), download the credentials JSON, and run the server once to complete the OAuth flow in your browser.

fields.label: Google OAuth Client ID
fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console

fields.label: Google OAuth Client Secret
fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console

registry.name: sequential-thinking
registry.description: Step-by-step reasoning for complex problems and decisions

registry.name: everart
registry.description: Generate images and artwork using AI

setup.instructions: Get an API key from Everart to generate images.

fields.label: Everart API Key
fields.description: API key from your Everart account

registry.name: everything
registry.description: Reference MCP server for testing — echoes, samples, prompts

registry.name: notion
registry.description: Read and manage Notion pages, databases, and workspaces

setup.instructions: Create a Notion integration and share the pages/databases you want to access with it.

fields.label: Notion Integration Token
fields.description: Internal integration secret from Notion developer portal

registry.name: linear
registry.description: Manage Linear issues, projects, and teams

setup.instructions: Generate a personal API key from your Linear account settings.

fields.label: Linear API Key
fields.description: Personal API key from Linear Settings > API

registry.name: exa-search
registry.description: AI-powered web search with content extraction

setup.instructions: Sign up at Exa to get an API key for AI-powered search.

fields.label: Exa API Key
fields.description: API key from your Exa dashboard

registry.name: todoist
registry.description: Manage Todoist tasks, projects, labels, and reminders

setup.instructions: Get your Todoist API token from Todoist Settings > Integrations > Developer.

fields.label: Todoist API Token
fields.description: API token from Todoist integrations settings

registry.name: apple-notes
registry.description: Read and search Apple Notes on macOS

registry.name: postgres
registry.description: Query PostgreSQL databases with read-only access

setup.instructions: Provide a PostgreSQL connection URL. The server connects in read-only mode.

fields.label: PostgreSQL Connection URL
fields.description: Full connection string including host, port, database, and credentials

registry.name: gdrive
registry.description: Search and read Google Drive files and documents

setup.instructions: Requires Google OAuth setup. Create a Google Cloud project, enable the Drive API, create OAuth 2.0 credentials (Desktop app type), and run the server once to complete the OAuth flow in your browser.

fields.label: Google OAuth Client ID
fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console

fields.label: Google OAuth Client Secret
fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console

registry.name: gmail
registry.description: Read, search, and draft Gmail emails

setup.instructions: Requires Google OAuth setup. Create a Google Cloud project, enable the Gmail API, create OAuth 2.0 credentials (Desktop app type), and run the server once to complete the OAuth flow in your browser.

fields.label: Google OAuth Client ID
fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console

fields.label: Google OAuth Client Secret
fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console

registry.name: time
registry.description: Get current time, timezone conversion, date calculations

registry.name: weather
registry.description: Get weather forecasts and current conditions by location

setup.instructions: Sign up for a free OpenWeather API key to get weather data.

fields.label: OpenWeather API Key
fields.description: API key from OpenWeather (free tier available)

registry.name: twitter
registry.description: Read tweets, search, and post to Twitter/X

setup.instructions: Create a Twitter/X developer app and get a Bearer Token for API access.

fields.label: Twitter Bearer Token
fields.description: Bearer token from your Twitter developer app

registry.name: youtube-transcript
registry.description: Get transcripts from YouTube videos for summarization
